title: STATUS 4 Socket Cable Reel, 5m, Green, 13 Amp, Thermal Cut Out, Heavy Duty, Outdoor Extension Lead, Ideal for DIY, Garden, Home, Workshop Use (S5M13ACR5)
features: COMPACT OUTDOOR POWER WITH MULTI-DEVICE SUPPORT STATUS 4 socket cable reel delivers reliable power through a 5 metre green extension lead, ideal for short-range use in gardens, workshops, and home environments. Designed for safe, flexible outdoor and indoor electrical access.

FOUR SOCKETS FOR MAXIMUM VERSATILITY Equipped with four 13 amp sockets, this reel supports multiple tools or appliances at once without extra adaptors. Ideal for powering garden lights, DIY tools, vacuums, and household equipment from one compact unit.

THERMAL CUT OUT FOR BUILT-IN SAFETY Features an integrated thermal cut out that disconnects power automatically if the reel overheats or is overloaded. This essential protection prevents equipment damage and ensures safe, long-lasting operation.

ROBUST DESIGN FOR DURABLE PERFORMANCE Built with a strong outer casing and stable base, the cable reel withstands frequent handling in active environments. The compact, tangle-free design is ideal for storage and everyday use both indoors and out.

PEACE OF MIND WITH 1 YEAR WARRANTY Comes with a 1 year manufacturer warranty against defects in materials or workmanship. The STATUS 5m cable reel provides dependable, safe performance for home, garden, and light professional use.
description: From the manufacturer Powered Up and Tangle-Free Discover Status' top-rated Cable Reels on Amazon, trusted by thousands for their reliability, convenience, and quality. Whether you need to power up your workspace, garden, or home, our range of cable reels offers the perfect solution. With features such as 2 or 4 sockets, long cable lengths of up to 18 metres, and durable designs so you can enjoy hassle-free electricity access wherever you go. More Infomation Features 4 sockets 18-meter cable length Constructed with sturdy materials Built-in thermal cut-out function Delivers up to 3120 watts of power Power Your Space with Ease Featuring four sockets, this reel allows you to connect multiple devices simultaneously, making it perfect for workshops, offices, or even outdoor spaces. With an 18-meter cable length, you'll have ample reach without the hassle of tangled cords. Built with durability in mind, this reel is designed to withstand frequent use, ensuring longevity. Additionally, its integrated thermal cut-out technology protects your devices from overheating and electrical hazards. Whether you're tackling DIY projects or simply need extra power around the house, the Status Cable Reel offers convenience and peace of mind. Features Up-to 18 Metre Cable Unlock freedom and flexibility with our 18-meter cable reels . Say goodbye to restrictive power sources and hello to the convenience of reaching even the most distant corners of your workspace, garden, or home. Don't let short cables hold you back – upgrade to our 18m cable length reels and enjoy uninterrupted power wherever you go. Thermal Cut-out Feature Stay safe and secure with our cable reels equipped with a thermal cutout feature. This innovative technology ensures automatic power shutdown in the event of overheating, providing an added layer of protection for you and your devices. With this feature, you can use our cable reels with confidence, knowing that your safety is our top priority. 4 Gang Outlets Enjoy unmatched versatility with our cable reels featuring up to 4 gang outlets. With multiple sockets available, you can conveniently power up to four devices simultaneously, eliminating the need for multiple power sources. Whether you're working in the garage, setting up a workstation, or hosting outdoor events, our cable reels provide the flexibility you need to stay connected. Convenient Wind-up Handle Simplify your power management with our convenient wind-up handle feature. With just a few quick rotations, you can effortlessly wind up the cable reel for tidy storage and transportation. Whether you're finishing up a DIY project or packing up your tools for the day, our cable reels with a convenient wind-up handle ensure hassle-free organization every time. Custom Portability Power up anywhere with our cable reels built for portability. Whether you're on a job site, camping in the great outdoors, or simply need power in hard-to-reach places, our cable reels have got you covered. Compact and lightweight, they're easy to carry and store, making them perfect for on-the-go use. 13 Amp Output Our cable reels boast a robust power output of 13 amps. When fully unwound, they deliver an impressive 3120 watts of power, ensuring a robust and reliable energy source for your operations. Bid farewell to power constraints and embrace boundless potential with our commanding cable reels.
